_comment: Shared cross-language decryption test vector (sdk.html §5). Test-only RSA-2048 keypair. PEM is PBES2 PKCS#8 (PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256 + AES-256-CBC, 100000 iters), produced via the OpenSSL CLI to match allus/src/pkcs8.js exactly. Wrappers match frontend/src/crypto.js (RSA-OAEP-SHA256 + AES-256-GCM, 12B IV, 16B tag appended). Regenerate with sdks/testdata/gen_vector.py.
encrypted_private_key_pem:
